after-hours tailor shop, tape measures hanging from locked fitting rooms
foggy miniature golf course with windmills turning over puddles
empty radio studio, microphones wrapped in grocery bags
snowy alley lined with bicycles wearing numbered tags
suburban birdbath filled with house keys and rainwater
closed nail salon, pedicure chairs facing a blank television
office supply aisle where staplers sit in perfect circles
riverside bench holding folded maps weighted by stones
empty hardware store, ceiling fans spinning at different speeds
foggy vineyard rows ending at a locked refrigerator
warehouse breakroom calendar filled with identical dentist appointments
city bike rack chained to twenty empty helmets
sunlit bakery case displaying only sealed envelopes
abandoned car dealership, balloons bobbing inside locked trunks
public archive table set with white gloves and wedding rings
empty planetarium lobby, constellations labeled with room numbers
flooded tennis court, ball machine feeding nothing
closed florist cooler packed with numbered lunchboxes
apartment laundry chute whispering through a taped-over handle
rural post office counter covered in damp feathers
